triage_rows.rationale: the spec now hard-codes first_visible_ts, close-bar activation, and shadow-only boundaries
simulator work is premature until the point-in-time feed can reconstruct canonical seed sessions without leakage
replay binding remains downstream and must not be reopened before visibility and simulator infrastructure exist

interpretation: V1.33P converts the visibility specification into an explicit start/stop decision for the intraday build chain.
Only phase_1_visibility should move now; later phases remain blocked by design.
